name: ai-db-client
description: A local-first database client plugin for AI agents with profiles, project routing, write guards, and audit logs.

interface.shortDescription: Profile-aware database access for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: AI DB Client provides a local MCP server and agent skill for querying and safely mutating PostgreSQL, MySQL, TDengine, and future database backends through configurable profiles, project routing, safety policies, and audit logs.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the database schema for this project.
Seed mock data using the dev database profile.
Suggest a database profile from this connection info.
